race.comment: LAST COMMAND (8) continued his fine run of form when beaten narrowly over the mile at this track last time out. Back in trip off a four-week break which looks a good scenario. Shapes as one of the hardest to beat. TRUE TO FORM (10) was handy all the way when beaten under a length over this track and trip recently. Up in grade but strips fitter and gets a glorious run from a favourable draw. TEN DEEP (13) stormed home but missed in a photo here over today's journey last start. Takes on a better field this time but her form this prep has been impossible to knock. FREE CARRY (3) is well placed dropping back from the mile and should be prominent for a long way.
